description_long: This helmet features a domed, olive-green crown with extensive black scuffing and weathering, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The front is dominated by a black T-shaped visor that covers the face, bordered by angular cheek plates and a pronounced brow. On the right side, a vertical rangefinder antenna extends upward, adding a distinctive technological element. The left side displays a metallic, gold-toned ear cap with a vertical groove, while the rear is mostly smooth with additional scuff marks and a subtle seam. The helmet's surface is matte with patches of gloss from wear, and there are no visible ventilation holes or branding. Its design is iconic, reminiscent of science fiction or bounty hunter motifs, and it appears to be constructed primarily from metal with possible internal padding.
description: A weathered, olive-green helmet with a black T-shaped visor, metallic side details, and a rangefinder antenna, showing heavy scuffing and a rugged, sci-fi appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black T-shaped visor, angular cheek plates, and the rangefinder antenna on the right side.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlights the gold-toned ear cap with a vertical groove and the rangefinder antenna extending upward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, scuffed dome and the back seam, with minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Left-side view displays the opposite ear cap and the rear attachment of the rangefinder, with the visor edge partially visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Weathered, olive-green surface with black scuff marks and a gold-toned ear cap; no distinct patterns or motifs.
